jobs.title: Policy Associate
jobs.description:
The Policy Associate will conduct research and analysis on a range of domestic and international policy issues, supporting senior staff in producing policy papers, testimony, and public commentary.

Responsibilities include monitoring legislative and regulatory developments, drafting briefing notes, and engaging with congressional staff and partner organisations.

jobs.title: Communications Manager
jobs.description:
The Communications Manager will lead the organisation's media relations strategy and oversee the production of digital and print communications materials.

The successful candidate will have experience managing relationships with journalists, producing press releases and op-eds, and developing content strategies for social media channels.
